pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Multi-pass streaming score-first TTT ensembles per-token min NLL so every token gets late-pass adaptation while RoPE caches stay trainable.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal test-time training adapts on validation tokens before final scoring, so updates happen solely on validation data.
techniques: Multi-pass streaming score-first TTT with per-token minimum NLL ensemble
Rotary cache clone fix to allow partial RoPE backprop during inference-mode TTT
